response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration ~2016-2018), Kotlin is absent, and there is no Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience. No IDE internals or language-tooling work is evident beyond brief C/C++ contributions to LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The JVM depth, Spring ecosystem fluency, and language-tooling interest required here are not demonstrated.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and clean, testable architecture
Prior IDE-adjacent C/C++ work at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure is limited and dated
No demonstrated work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM tooling

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and limited, dated Java exposure
Strong general software craftsmanship and large-scale systems background
